name: /operator-extension-init dry-run prints the planned extension file without creating it
command: mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/google && printf 'source:\n  id: google-tsguide\n' > generated-code-quality-standards/google/tsguide.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/operator-extension-init.sh" google tsguide --root generated-code-quality-standards --dry-run 2>out.txt && [ ! -f generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/google/tsguide-extensions.yaml ] && grep -q 'planned: scaffold _operator/google/tsguide-extensions.yaml' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
